hero.subtitle: The right AI for every post, automatically optimized. Captions, copy, calendars — all in one place, with full cost control.
hero.socialProof: NO CARD REQUIRED · START IN 30 SECONDS

pain.pain1_desc: You write a prompt in ChatGPT, the result isn't right. You rewrite it. Try again. 20 minutes wasted on a post that should take 2.
pain.pain2_desc: The AI gives you vague text you can't publish. You edit everything. What's the point of AI if you're doing all the work?
pain.pain3_desc: You pay for 3 different subscriptions and have no clue if you're spending €10 or €50 a month. Zero visibility.

demo.subtitle: Before sending to the AI, SavvyOwl transforms your request into a professional prompt. Better results on the first try.
demo.before_text: Write me an Instagram caption about the brand's new product, something that grabs attention and that people want to share, with emojis and relevant hashtags to increase reach
demo.after_text: Instagram caption: product launch. Tone: enthusiastic, shareable. Include: strong hook in line 1, CTA, 5 niche hashtags. Format: caption with line breaks.

howItWorks.step1_desc: Write in plain language: 'Instagram caption for the launch', 'Stories copy for the sale', 'Reels ideas for this week'. No technical commands needed.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Your request is automatically transformed into a professional prompt and sent to the AI that best handles that type of content.
howItWorks.step3_desc: The response arrives in seconds. You see what it cost. If you liked it, save the prompt to reuse tomorrow with another client.

benefits.card1_desc: Your request is improved before reaching the AI. Stronger captions, sharper copy, hooks that grab. All on the first try.
benefits.card2_title: The right AI for each post
benefits.card2_desc: Quick caption? Gemini Flash. Full blog article? Claude. Content strategy? Gemini Pro. SavvyOwl picks automatically.
benefits.card3_desc: See the cost of every request, per day, per month, per client. Set a budget. No surprises on the bill.

chat.startConversationDesc: Choose a mode and write what you need. SavvyOwl optimizes and sends it to the best AI.
chat.contentCreatorBanner: ContentCreator AI — optimized for captions, scripts, and copy
chat.upgradeMode: Upgrade to Pro to use this mode.
chat.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete this conversation and all its messages.

qa.caption: Instagram caption
qa.captionPrompt: Create an Instagram caption for a product launch post. Include a strong hook in the first line, relevant emojis, CTA, and 5 niche hashtags.
qa.reelsPrompt: Create a 15-second Reels script. Include a hook in the first 3 seconds, main content, and final CTA. Format: scene by scene with text and action.
qa.calendarPrompt: Create a 1-week Instagram content calendar (Monday to Friday). For each day: post type (carousel, reels, stories), theme, hook, and best posting time. Niche: digital marketing.
qa.storiesPrompt: Create a 5-Story Instagram sequence aimed at driving engagement. Include: poll, quiz, question box, and CTA to link in bio. Tone: casual and relatable.
qa.ugcPrompt: Create a 30-second UGC video script to promote a skincare product. Format: scene by scene with visual, audio, and on-screen text. Style: authentic, like a real review.
qa.ideasPrompt: Give me 10 Instagram content ideas for the digital marketing niche. For each idea: format (reels, carousel, post), hook, and unique angle. Focus on content that drives saves and shares.
